# ishosting_vps_ips (Data Source)

Retrieves all IP addresses assigned to an ISHosting VPS instance.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `vps_id` (String) The VPS instance ID.

### Read-Only

- `ipv4` (Attributes List) List of IPv4 addresses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ipv4))
- `ipv6` (Attributes List) List of IPv6 addresses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ipv6))
- `public_ip` (String) The primary public IP address of the VPS.

<a id="nestedatt--ipv4"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ipv4`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) IP address.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway address.
- `is_main` (Boolean) Whether this is the main IP.
- `mask` (String) Subnet mask.
- `rdns` (String) Reverse DNS record.


<a id="nestedatt--ipv6"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ipv6`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) IP address.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway address.
- `is_main` (Boolean) Whether this is the main IP.
- `mask` (String) Subnet mask.
- `rdns` (String) Reverse DNS record.
